zh.lifeSummary: Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth是Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth和Mrs Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth的兒子，於大約1466年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利。他和Gwerful ferch Jenkin至少有1個女兒。他去世於大約1530年在威爾士丹比爾盧阿邦享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth是Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth和Mrs Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth的儿子，于大约1466年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利。他和Gwerful ferch Jenkin至少有1个女儿。他去世于大约1530年在威尔士丹比爾盧阿邦享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Ieuan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth was born about 1466, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth and Mrs Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth. He had at least 1 daughter with Gwerful ferch Jenkin. He died about 1530, in Ruabon, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth est né environ 1466, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth et Mrs Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Gwerful ferch Jenkin. Il est décédé environ 1530, à Ruabon, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth wurde um 1466 in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth und Mrs Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth geboren. Er hatte mit Gwerful ferch Jenkin mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1530 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Ruabon, Denbighshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth è nato il circa 1466 nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth e Mrs Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Gwerful ferch Jenkin. Morì circa 1530, nel Ruabon, Denbighshire, Galles, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerthは約1466年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーでGruffudd ap Ieuan ap IorwerthとMrs Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerthの息子として生まれた。彼はGwerful ferch Jenkinとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1530年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルアボンで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth(은)는 대략 1466년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth(와)과 Mrs Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Gwerful ferch Jenkin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1530년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루압에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth nasceu aproximadamente 1466, em Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom filho de Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth e Mrs Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Gwerful ferch Jenkin. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1530, em Ruabon, Denbighshire, Gales, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth родился около 1466 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth и Mrs Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Gwerful ferch Jenkin. Он умер около 1530 г. в местности руабон, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth nació aproximadamente 1466, en Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido como hijo de Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth y Mrs Gruffudd ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Gwerful ferch Jenkin. Murió aproximadamente 1530, en Ruabon, Denbighshire, Gales, a la edad de 66 años.
